title: Mandya
desc: Ganesh, also known as Eshwar, is compelled to move to the city after the bloodshed in his native town devastates him. When he returns years later, he adopts the task of educating people.

title: Ninne Preethisuve
desc: A soldier dies in a war after he gets engaged to Meghamala. When she learns that his eyes were donated to another man, a sudden turn of events changes her life forever.

title: Thangigagi
desc: Veerabhadra who loves his sister very much gets her married to a nice man. But when Veerabhadra's close friend is killed, he decides to wipe out anti-social elements in the city.

title: Neer Dose
desc: A retired government worker, a van driver, a sex worker and the owner of a milk stall lead an odd friendship as they try to navigate through their lives.

title: Live - Mumbai Indians vs. Royal Challengers Bengaluru; TATA IPL
desc: Various cricket teams compete against each other in the Indian Premier League tournament.

title: Live - Amul Cricket Live
desc: Experts and personalities share their insights on players, performances and statistics from major cricket competitions, live.
